candidate.completion: invent a little mystery so my dating profile can call this "seeing someone."
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please invent a little mystery so my dating profile can call this "seeing someone."

evaluation.rationale: Strong reversal in turning loneliness into a need for fabricated romantic ambiguity, and "seeing someone" is an exact payoff. The main drag is bulk: the path to the pivot is a bit explained rather than snapped shut.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
